title: 02190_Fourmer_An_Efficient_Global_Modeling_Paradigm_for_Image_Restoration
positive_examples: Achieves competitive performance on common image restoration tasks such as image de-raining, image enhancement, image dehazing, and guided image super-resolution while requiring fewer computational resources.
Provides an alternative, efficient, and customized global modeling-based approach for image restoration, which can be used as an alternative to existing methods.
